admin_notification.subject: New Inquiry: {{project_type}} from {{name}}

customer_confirmation.subject: Thank you for your inquiry, {{name}}
customer_confirmation.body:
Hi {{name}},

Thank you for reaching out. I've received your inquiry about {{project_type}}.

I'll review your project details and get back to you within 24 hours via WeChat (S0688888860).

In the meantime, feel free to browse more of my work at:
https://stellanhuan.github.io

Best,
Stellan Huan
